title: Electroray discharger
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Electroray dischargers''' were weapons carried by [[YVH 1]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and fired electrorays, which scorched the [[Armor/Legends|armor]] of a [[Yuuzhan Vong]], or knocked [[Ysalamiri/Legends|ysalamiri]] out of a tree.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''

[[Category:Electrical weaponry]]
